subcodes.title: Words to Mrs. A.S.K. [Alma Sedonia Knobloch], spoken on 1913-04-02
subcodes.first_line: If they cannot arrange to go every Sunday, they must go every other Sunday, if not every other Sunday then once a month.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @exhortations and counsels, @importance of community building
